_draft_note: OPERATOR-OWNED DATA — DRAFT, NOT RATIFIED. Seeded 2026-07-07 by H1 from the domains actually cited across the five src/data/*.json files (grep of every levels.level3.cards[].source.url). Bucketed here into obvious tier1/tier2/denied per the H1 spec's instructions; the operator rules on final placement (H1 handoff, item 2). 'denied' is an extension beyond the spec's documented {tier1,tier2} shape, added so the known FactCheck.org tier violation (D-004) produces a CI-red ERROR rather than a soft WARN — see H1 handoff for the reasoning and an escalation asking the operator to ratify (or reject) this third bucket.
